dialogue: Today is a special day.
It's another field trip!
Hello kiddoes! Who is excited for the field trip?
Of course, it is also a time for learning.
Let's get started!
You are correct!
Oh look, a beetle! Or is it a spider?
Anyway, time for more questions.
I love field trips.
There is so much to discover!
That's the right answers
It is important to learn more about our world.
That's the most fun part of a field trip!
Your progress is very quick!
My favourite topic at school is biology.
It teaches you about plants and animals!
And you, what is your favourite topic?
You are such a good learner!
We are getting close to the end of this field trip
But there is still a lot to learn!
Amazing!
I loved this field trip!
Can you remember everything we learned about ?
These questions will be more difficult.
Congratulations! The field trip is now over.
We learned a lot today!
Thank you for joining me on this road trip. I hope you had fun!
